title: Vidhigya Associates advises Finfinity on seed fundraise
description: Synergenius Growth Private Limited, dba FinFinity, has raised $2.4 million from a seed fundraise led by Mankind Pharma Promoter’s family office.The round also saw participation from Vi-John Group, Sanjay Singhvi, Bavadeep Reddy, Malani Ventures Pvt Ltd (Sanjay Shah Family office), Gurshant Singh Bhatia, Sunny Bhatia, Upkaran Singh Chawla and Harbir Dhingra, besides some angel investors.Vidhigya Associates, Advocates FinFinity and its Promoters on this fundraise.
